title: Getting Started with Quarto
text:
Quarto is an open-source scientific and technical publishing system built on Pandoc. It allows you to create dynamic documents, websites, presentations, and books with code and text together.



Reproducible — code and output live in the same file
Multi-language — supports R, Python, Julia, and Observable JS
Multiple outputs — render to HTML, PDF, Word, and more
Easy publishing — deploy to GitHub Pages, Quarto Pub, Netlify, etc.




summary(cars)
That’s it — your code runs and the output is embedded automatically!

title: Zhijian Ge
text:
Welcome to my website! I’m Edward Ge passionate about Data Analyst and Market Prediction.
I use this space to share my projects, research, and thoughts. Feel free to explore and reach out!


欢迎来到我的个人网站！我是葛智健，热衷于数据分析和市场预测。
这里是我分享项目、研究和想法的地方，欢迎随意浏览，也欢迎联系我！

title: Analysis of Cars
text:
Let’s investigate the relationship between fuel efficiency (mpg) and engine displacement (disp) from the mtcars dataset.
Those variables have a correlation of r cor(mtcars$mpg, mtcars$disp) |> format(digits=2).


Here is a plot:
library(tidyverse)
...



There is a clear negative relationship between fuel efficiency and engine size. Larger engines tend to consume more fuel.
